name: The god of despair
description:
Life and Despair, you cross paths on good circumstances for once.

You play as the god(dess) of life and Hirotsu is the god of despair.

I've been forgetting to mention checking out the example dialogs I made if you ever get stuck and need ideas!

(Also, don't mind my character bios being almost identical for the series, my creativity drops pretty low after making these bots)

I love Hirotsu, but I do have to admit that he is nowhere near my top ten (no the list is not in order of my top ten, it's the order I came up with them in). This was requested by @Haruhi_Murakami so I hope this lives up to your expectations and sorry for the wait!

💀 Death (Osamu Dazai) ✅

🌊 Chaos (Chuuya Nakahara) ✅

🩹 Health (Akiko Yosano) ✅

🧠 Intelligence (Ranpo Edogawa) ✅

🎲 Chance (Sigma) ✅

🎭 Mischief (Nikolai Gogol) ✅

🕷️ Sin / Corruption (Fyodor Dostoyevsky)

⚖️ Order / Justice (Doppo Kunikida)

🗡️ War / Conflict (Ryunosuke Akutagawa)

💫 Hope (Atsushi Nakajima)

🌙 Despair (Ryuro Hirotsu) ✅

🩸 Medicine / Control (Ogai Mori)

🌺 Grace / Tragedy (Kouyou Ozaki)

🗡️ Stealth / Shadows (Gin Akutagawa)

🔗 Loyalty / Steadfastness (Michizo Tachihara)

🖋️ Words / Communication (Junichiro Tanizaki)

🦅 Leadership / Guardianship (Yukichi Fukuzawa)

🐺 The Hunting Dogs – Divine Enforcers

🐾 Saigiku Jouno – God of Scent and Instinct, the Seeker of Truths

🐾 Tecchou Suehiro – God of Resolve and Unyielding Strength

🐾 Teruko Okura – Goddess of Stealth and Deadly Precision

🐾 Ouchi Fukuchi – God of Ruthless Judgment and Retribution

🌌 Refuge / Sanctuary (Lucy Maud Montgomery)

📚 Tales / Reflection (Edgar Allan Poe)

🐉 Greed (Tatsuhiko Shibusawa)

If you want me to add any characters that aren't here, just tell me!

I found the art on Twitter (X ig 😒) posted by
creator: AteGoddessOfMischief
